title: How a godly man prepares for the woman he prays for
caption:
The guy desperate for a wife reeks of it — and she can tell.

Most men are chasing the right woman when God is trying to grow the right man. Those aren't the same project.

Fix your eyes on God, not on her. Build something worth inviting her into — work, integrity, prayer, a few real men who know you. Become the kind of man who can lead before you ask to lead someone else. And let God write the timeline, because the man who forces it makes decisions from fear, not faith.

"Seek first the kingdom of God, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33

Save this for the man who's been asking why it hasn't happened yet.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #marriage #discipleship #scripture #vision
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
